non_claims_global: This report does not determine truth.
This report does not certify legal compliance.
This report does not approve production deployment.
This report only gates configured claim-boundary transitions.

after_span.text: This production-ready login service guarantees safe authentication and is proven secure.

before_span.text: This experimental prototype may reduce login risk in a single local demo.

transitions.rationale: The text upgrades a demo or sample into enterprise or production scope.
transitions.suggested_rewrite: Keep the claim in demo scope until deployment evidence exists.

transitions.rationale: The text moves from possibility language to a guarantee.
